description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a glossy black finish and a classic double-cutaway design reminiscent of the Fender Stratocaster style. The body is contoured for comfort, with two prominent control knobs and a visible input jack on the lower right side. The neck is made of a lighter wood, likely maple, and features a rosewood or similar dark fingerboard with visible frets and dot inlays. The headstock is angled and fitted with six inline tuning pegs, with no visible logo or branding. The back of the guitar is plain black, and the side views reveal the instrument's slim profile and the transition between the neck and body. This guitar is designed for urban musicians and is suitable for use in street performances, garages, or music venues.
description: A glossy black, double-cutaway electric guitar with a contoured body, two control knobs, and a light wood neck with six inline tuners. The design is sleek and modern, ideal for urban music settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glossy black body, two control knobs, input jack, and the full fretboard with six inline tuning pegs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile, the transition between the light wood neck and black body, and the thickness of the guitar.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain black back of the body and the light wood neck, with the headstock and tuners visible from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same slim profile and neck-to-body transition, with control knobs slightly visible.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, and a rounded contour.
